programme.desc: I den tro at de er ved at styrte ned, fortæller Emma alle sine hemmeligheder til en flot, men vildfremmed mand om bord på et fly. Det vil sige, hun troede, at han var fremmed… Filmen er baseret på bestsellerromanen af samme navn fra Sophie Kinsella.

programme.desc: Elvis is a karate-chopping biker who's hired as a carnival Roustabout. At first he just provides muscle and a diversion for the beautiful carny girls. Then he picks up a guitar and gets the midway rockin'.

programme.title: Couples Vacation

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Instinct

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Broken Circle

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Collector
programme.desc: Johnny's (Anthony Michael Hall) visions of a young girl's abduction lead him on a life-and-death race to find the collector (Brian Markinson), a disturbed man who kidnaps and indoctrinates young women.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Jungle
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader vikaren
programme.desc: En videnskabeligt anlagt vikar gør Chris’ liv til et helvede ved at forvente mere af ham end af klassekammeraterne.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader at pjække
programme.desc: Da læreren miss Morello er væk i en dag, beslutter Chris og Greg sig for at pjække og tage i biografen og se ”Ghostbusters”.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader smykketyveri
programme.desc: Da Chris forpurrer Malvos forsøg på at stjæle en guldkæde fra Vanessa, giver Malvo Chris én dag til at finde en anden halskæde, ellers må han svare for følgerne.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader DJ's
programme.desc: Da nabolagets DJ bliver anholdt under en fest, overtager Chris tjansen og viser sig at være et stort hit blandt publikum.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader baseball
programme.desc: Chris står i et dilemma, da han skal vælge mellem at tage til baseballkamp med sin far og Drew eller gå i biografen med Tasha.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader hasardspil
programme.desc: Chris bliver Bed-Stuys yndlings bookmaker, da Doc opdager, at han har talent for at forudsige sportsresultater.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader frække vittigheder
programme.desc: Efter at have smuglyttet til sine forældres comedy-plader prøver Chris nogle frække vitser af på sine klassekammerater og opdager, at evnen til at få andre til at grine er nøglen til at blive populær. Men hans lærer har et andet synspunkt på sagen.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader matematik
programme.desc: Hele Chris’ klasse regner med, at han kan lære alt om alegebra til en matematikkonkurrence, og Rochelle giver sig til selv at undervise Chris.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader sidste skoledag
programme.desc: Sidste skoledag nærmer sig med hastige skridt, og Chris beslutter sig for at tage hævn over Caruso for at have gjort de sidste to år af hans liv til et helvede.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader studievejlederen
programme.desc: Da Chris klarer sig dårligt til en eksamen sender miss Morello ham til skolens studievejleder, mr. Abbott.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader Caruso
programme.desc: Uden Caruso til at opretholde skolens magtbalance og med alle dem, der prøver at overtage hans rolle, indser Chris og Greg, at de er nødt til at komme med en løsning.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader at køre
programme.desc: Alt går helt galt, da den kørekortløse Chris melder sig frivilligt til at flytte sin fars bil, men kommer til at køre bilen hele vejen til skolen i et forsøg på at imponere Tasha.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader Blackie
programme.desc: Da der er indbrud i lejligheden, beslutter Julius og Rochelle sig for, at det er en god idé at få hund; noget, som Chris altid har ønsket sig.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader ungkarlehybelen
programme.desc: Da hele Chris’ familie får influenza, aftaler Rochelle og Julius med mr. Omar, at han skal passe Chris, indtil familien har det bedre.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader Bed Stuy
programme.desc: For at blive noteret for en fritidsaktivitet melder Chris sig til at skrive på skoleavisen.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader overnattende gæster
programme.desc: Gregs far er ude at rejse, så Chris inviterer Greg til at bo hjemme hos ham i en uge.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader mindsteløn
programme.desc: Da Doc nægter at give Chris lønforhøjelse, får Chris et nyt arbejde på den lokale kinesiske restaurant.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader den nye dreng
programme.desc: Da en ny elev, Albert, starter på Corleone, indser Chris, at han har meget mere til fælles med Albert end blot at være de to eneste sorte elever i skolen.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader Kwanzaa
programme.desc: Juleferien nærmer sig, og Chris’ ferieglæde bliver til feriedepression, da hans lærer, miss Morello, beder alle eleverne om at gøre en god gerning i juleferien.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader transportmyndighederne
programme.desc: Chris og hans familie beslutter sig for at tage en tur til Syden for at deltage i begravelsen af en af Julius’ fjerne slægtninge.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader slemme drenge
programme.desc: Da Chris opdager, at hans flamme, Tasha, elsker ”slemme drenge”, beslutter han sig for at lægge den ”flinke fyr” på hylden og vinde sin drømmepiges hjerte.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader det første kys
programme.desc: Da Chris hører, at Tasha tager til fester, hvor man leger flaskeleg, prøver han at få en invitation til næste fest, så han endelig kan få sit første kys.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader påske
programme.desc: Da Tasha slår op med sin kæreste, træder Chris gerne til for at eskortere hende til påskekonkurrencen, men først skal han finde ud af, hvordan han kan være to steder på én gang, uden at hans mor opdager det.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader Gretzky
programme.desc: I et forsøg på at holde sin bror væk fra ballade siger Chris modvilligt ja til at pjække fra skole og tage med Drew ud på en mission for at finde hans idol, ishockeyspilleren Wayne Gretzky.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader BFD
programme.desc: Chris er så desperat for at skaffe penge til en koncert med Run DMC, at han griber muligheden for at ansøge om mr. Omars Black Funeral Directors’ (BFD) stipendium.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader eksfangerne
programme.desc: Chris forsøger at hjælpe Malvo, en vaneforbryder, som lige er blevet løsladt fra fængslet, med at ændre sit liv ved at gå tilbage til high school.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader Jordens dag
programme.desc: Chris skal finde på et skoleprojekt til Jordens dag, så han indsamler tomme dåser i den tro, at det vil blive en let opgave, som Julius kan hjælpe ham med.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris DA: Alle hader at være cool
programme.desc: Chris er på en mission for at blive en af de ”cool” børn og bliver taget med cigaretter og bortvist fra skolen.

programme.desc: Chris og Greg har ingen dates til gallafesten i 9. klasse, men så bliver Greg inviteret med, så Chris må gå alene. Miss Morello foreslår, at Chris inviterer den eneste pige, der ikke har en date endnu, Carrie White, og hun siger ja.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester står ansigt til ansigt med sin fraværende far, en pensioneret general, som beder Team Scorpion om hjælp, da han er overbevist om, at en diktator i Afrika har fundet et masseødelæggelsesvåben.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion har til opgave at bistå NASA's tophemmelige raketaffyring, men de må sabotere deres egen mission, da Walters date fra den foregående aften har en bombe fastspændt på sin brystkasse.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Fractured
programme.desc: Efter et kraftigt jordskælv rammer Los Angeles, skal Team Scorpion reparere en beskadiget gasledning for at forhindre en voldsom eksplosion.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Adaptation
programme.desc: Mens Team Scorpion arbejder på at stoppe en tilstrømning af narkotika, der bliver smuglet ind i landet via droner, giver Walter Happy og Toby et ultimatum om deres nye forhold.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: The Fast and the Nerdiest
programme.desc: Team Scorpion skal infiltrere en eksklusiv bilsmuglervirksomhed, der er i færd med at sende biovåben til Sydamerika.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Ticker
programme.desc: Da Los Angeles' blodforsyning bliver hacket og anset for at være ubrugelig, må Team Scorpion finde den skyldige og redde en ung pige, der desperat har brug for en hjertetransplantation.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: Cabe bliver taget til fange under en hemmelig mission i Djibouti sammen med sin nye Homeland-protegé Tim Armstrong, og Team Scorpion må redde ham.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Twist and Shout
programme.desc: Da en dødbringende tornado styrer direkte mod Team Scorpion under deres mission for at bjærge resterne af faldne marinesoldater i Vietnam, bringes både deres liv og missionen i alvorlig fare.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Team Scorpion bliver hyret af forsvarsministeriet til at bryde ind i Fort Knox og "stjæle" en værdifuld artefakt for at teste deres sikkerhed.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion tager til Tjernobyl for at reparere den forfaldne atomreaktor, inden der sker en katastrofal nedsmeltning, men så bliver Sylvester og Paige fanget derinde.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Toby or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må udmanøvrere deres ustabile tidligere Scorpion-medlem, Mark Collins, efter at han har kidnappet Toby og truer med at dræbe ham, hvis ikke hans udspekulerede krav bliver opfyldt.

programme.title: Scorpion DA: Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må lægge deres personlige og romantiske problemer til side, da anonyme hackere med ukendte motiver overtager kontrollen over amerikanske militærfly og krigsskibe.

programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Life magazine does a photo layout on the Ricardos and the only part of Lucy visible in the shot is her elbow. Lucy insists on getting a part in Ricky's act so that she can make a name for herself.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.sub-title: Ricky and Fred Are TV Fans
programme.desc: Dismayed that they can't seem to unglue their husbands from the boxing match on TV, Lucy and Ethel decided to go out for a bite to eat. However, at the local café they run into a similar problem.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos have just purchased a new washing machine and despite their better judgment, agree to sell their old one to the Mertzes. The next day the old machine explodes with water and suds and the Mertzes insist that the deal is off.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After watching two women walk out of a local dress shop with $200 in purchases, Lucy and Ethel decide to buy the shop and go into business for themselves. The first signs of trouble begin when they can't agree on a name for their store.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.sub-title: Lucy and Ethel Buy the Same Dress
programme.desc: The annual talent show for the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League is going to be televised this year, and Lucy and Ethel are going to perform a duet. Everything is going well as Lucy gets Ricky to emcee the show and help her and Ethel prepare.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: treated as if they were men. Later on when the two couples go out to dinner, Fred and Ricky follow the ladies' instructions.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's friend Charlie Appleby and his wife Caroline are coming over for dinner at the Ricardos. Charlie is going to have Ricky emcee a TV program he's working on and so Ricky wants to make a good impression at dinner.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky, Fred, and Ethel don't believe that Lucy could go one day without telling a lie. To prove their point, they bet her $100 that within 24 hours she'll be fibbing up a storm.

programme.desc: Lucy decides that their unborn child should have artistic leanings, so she takes up sculpting. The fast-talking salesman in the art supply store she visits sells her an enormous amount of modeling clay, claiming she has talent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: With her baby due any moment, Lucy finds it challenging trying to remain calm given Ricky's nervous behavior. When she asks the Mertzes to come over to offset Ricky, she winds up with three very anxious people.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos' infant is cranky and keeps his parents as well as their neighbors up at night. When a neighbor, Mrs. Trumbull points out that the lease forbids children and threatens to move out along with other tenants.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky are exhausted from walking the baby at night and hire a maid. Lucy prepares a list of dos and don'ts in order to set down the law for her new employee. However when Mrs. Porter arrives, she has her own list for her employer.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to get into the act when Ricky is producing an Indian show at the Tropicana. Ricky instead hires the Mertzes to be part of the show, hoping Lucy will be cured of her show biz bug now that she is a mother.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky has planned a surprise party for Lucy's birthday and swears the Mertzes and all their friends to secrecy. Lucy, however, only knows that everyone has forgotten her birthday.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides that the Ricardos need a bigger apartment. She discovers that an older couple in the building just had their daughter move out and they no longer need the extra space. All she needs to do is to convince Ricky to go along with the trade.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: An eligible bachelor is in town, and Lucy wants to set him up with a girlfriend of hers. The bachelor is a lingerie salesman by the name of Eddie Grant who is a friend of the Mertzes. Unfortunately, Lucy's attempts at matchmaking fail.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Without consulting Ricky, Lucy buys new living room furniture, using their old set as a down payment. Waiting for the right moment to tell Ricky the news, she hides the new furniture in the kitchen.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels that she and Ricky are growing apart because they don't share many of the same interests. To make up for this, Lucy decides to invite herself along to a camping trip that Ricky and Fred are going on.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Life magazine does a photo layout on the Ricardos and the only part of Lucy visible in the shot is her elbow. Lucy insists on getting a part in Ricky's act so that she can make a name for herself.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.sub-title: Ricky and Fred Are TV Fans
programme.desc: Dismayed that they can't seem to unglue their husbands from the boxing match on TV, Lucy and Ethel decided to go out for a bite to eat. However, at the local café they run into a similar problem.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos have just purchased a new washing machine and despite their better judgment, agree to sell their old one to the Mertzes. The next day the old machine explodes with water and suds and the Mertzes insist that the deal is off.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After watching two women walk out of a local dress shop with $200 in purchases, Lucy and Ethel decide to buy the shop and go into business for themselves. The first signs of trouble begin when they can't agree on a name for their store.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.sub-title: Lucy and Ethel Buy the Same Dress
programme.desc: The annual talent show for the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League is going to be televised this year, and Lucy and Ethel are going to perform a duet. Everything is going well as Lucy gets Ricky to emcee the show and help her and Ethel prepare.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: treated as if they were men. Later on when the two couples go out to dinner, Fred and Ricky follow the ladies' instructions.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's friend Charlie Appleby and his wife Caroline are coming over for dinner at the Ricardos. Charlie is going to have Ricky emcee a TV program he's working on and so Ricky wants to make a good impression at dinner.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky, Fred, and Ethel don't believe that Lucy could go one day without telling a lie. To prove their point, they bet her $100 that within 24 hours she'll be fibbing up a storm.

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes have a close encounter of the French kind, when they go to a bistro and have no clue how to read the menu. Later on, Lucy and Ethel decide to brush up on their French in order to get in the show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Spying Lucy's new mink stole, Ethel complains about how shabby her apartment is. She's ashamed of holding a meeting for the Wednesday Afternoon Fine Arts League at her place where women will be donning minks.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: It all started with the good intention of getting Fred a new suit for his birthday. Lucy needed to "borrow" an old suit of Fred's for the correct measurements, but there was a witness to her burglary.

programme.desc: A magazine test has gotten Lucy into a tizzy. Lucy and Ricky take a test called "How to Rate Your Marriage." One of the questions in the quiz asks about old flames. When Lucy rattles off a list of old boyfriends, Ricky feels the need to compare.

programme.desc: The Mertzes get a pair of new tenants. Sam and Nancy Johnson are from Texas and reportedly have inside knowledge on a certain oil stock that is about to shoot through the roof. Lucy and Ethel are excited by the prospect, but Fred and Ricky have doubts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: How long can Ricky Ricardo go, without losing his temper? When Lucy buys a new hat for $49.50, Ricky goes ballistic. To make a point, Lucy bets Ricky the cost of the hat that he'll lose his temper long before her next purchase.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hurt that no one seems to care for his home movies, Ricky declares that he will never show them another feature of his...not even the TV pilot he's creating. Jealous of his project, Lucy enables the help of the Mertzes and creates her own musical western.

programme.desc: Ricky scoffs at his wife and Ethel when they adamantly participate in the hunt for the "Bonus Buck" that will win them prize money from a newspaper contest. Later, Ricky discovers one of the lucky bucks in his own wallet.
